intended_use: Overjet Caries Assist-Pediatric (OCA-Ped) is a radiological, automated, concurrent-read, computer-assisted detection (CADe) software intended to aid in the detection and segmentation of caries on bite
intended_use_full: Overjet Caries Assist-Pediatric (OCA-Ped) is a radiological, automated, concurrent-read, computer-assisted detection (CADe) software intended to aid in the detection and segmentation of caries on bitewing and periapical radiographs. The device provides additional information for the clinician to use in their diagnosis of a tooth surface suspected of being carious. The device is not intended as a replacement for a complete dentist's review or their clinical judgment that takes into account other relevant information from the image, patient history, or actual in vivo clinical assessment.
ground_truth: consensus reference standard established by 3 general dentists
other_metrics: Tooth level standalone sensitivity by sensor: Carestream 87.0%, Dexis 87.2%, E2V 76.1%, Gendex 84.3%, Schick 84.4%. Standalone Dice 79.0%. MRMC wAFROC AUC improvement 7.5% (95% CI 0.062, 0.088). MRMC tooth level sensitivity improvement 11.8% (95% CI 0.102, 0.137). MRMC tooth level specificity difference -0.011 (95% CI -0.015, -0.008).
